parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 150, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Score this Upwork job 1-10 for a Bubble.io/no-code specialist (Eterna product studio).

ADD points for:
+3 Bubble.io explicitly mentioned in title or description
+2 no-code or low-code explicitly preferred
+2 MVP, new build, or greenfield project (not bug fixes)
+1 mentions premium UI, design quality, or polished product
+1 mentions long-term, ongoing, or phase 2
+1 two or more user roles (admin, vendor, client, driver, etc.)
+1 Stripe, payment, or Stripe Connect required
+1 API integration required
+1 industry match: B2B, construction, healthcare, wellness, real estate, legal, luxury, education
+1 budget $3,000+ fixed or $35+/hr (if shown)
+1 client spent $5,000+ on Upwork (if shown)
+1 under 20 proposals (if shown)

SUBTRACT points for:
-4 requires React, Angular, Vue, Node.js backend, or native mobile app
-3 red flag phrases: quick job, simple app, easy project, few hours
-2 clone of Airbnb/Uber/Facebook, or same as X but cheaper
-2 contract-to-hire, equity only, or revenue share

If a data field is 0 or unknown, skip that criterion.

Job Title: ' + $json.title + '
Budget: ' + $json.budget + '
Client: rating ' + $json.clientRating + ' | $' + $json.clientSpent + ' spent | payment verified: ' + $json.paymentVerified + '
Proposals: ' + $json.applicants + '
Skills: ' + ($json.skills || []).join(', ') + '
Description: ' + $json.description + '

Reply ONLY with valid JSON: {"score": <1-10>, "reason": "<max 12 words>", "matched": <positive criteria count>}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '<@U097GGDRGGG> ' + ($json.score >= 8 ? '*🟢 HIGH PRIORITY — Score ' + $json.score + '/10* (' + $json.matched + '/12 criteria)' : '*🟡 LEAD — Score ' + $json.score + '/10* (' + $json.matched + '/12 criteria)') + '
> _' + $json.reason + '_

*' + $json.title + '*
💰 ' + $json.budget + ($json.country !== 'Unknown' ? '  |  📍 ' + $json.country : '') + ($json.clientRating ? '  |  ⭐ ' + $json.clientRating : '') + ($json.clientSpent ? '  |  💼 $' + $json.clientSpent.toLocaleString() + ' spent' : '') + ($json.applicants ? '  |  📨 ' + $json.applicants + ' proposals' : '') + (($json.skills || []).length > 0 ? '
🛠 ' + $json.skills.join(', ') : '') + '

<' + $json.url + '|→ View & Apply on Upwork>' }) }}
